scripts.lint:secrets: gitleaks detect --source . --no-git 2>/dev/null || echo 'gitleaks not installed: run brew install gitleaks'
scripts.check:public-keys: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dangerous=['OPENAI_API_KEY','STRIPE_SECRET_KEY','STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET','APIFY_API_TOKEN','ENCRYPTION_KEY','API_JWT_SECRET','ADMIN_API_KEY','RESEND_API_KEY','META_APP_SECRET','BETTER_AUTH_SECRET'];const found=[];require('child_process').execSync('grep -r NEXT_PUBLIC_ apps/web/src --include=*.ts --include=*.tsx -l 2>/dev/null || true',{encoding:'utf8'}).split('\n').filter(Boolean).forEach(f=>{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');dangerous.forEach(k=>{if(c.includes('NEXT_PUBLIC_'+k))found.push(k+' in '+f)})});if(found.length){console.error('\u274c Server-only secrets found in NEXT_PUBLIC_ context:',found);process.exit(1)}else{console.log('\u2705 No server-only secrets exposed as NEXT_PUBLIC_')}"
